orcasimpleinput: wB97M-V def2-TZVPD EnGrad RIJCOSX def2/J NoUseSym DIIS NOSOSCF NormalConv DEFGRID3 ALLPOP NoTRAH NONBO NONPA
orcablocks:
%scf 
  Convergence Tight
  maxiter 500
  THRESH 1e-12
  TCUT 1e-13
  Shift Shift 0.1 ErrOff 0.1 end
  DIISMaxEq   7
  Guess PModel
end
%elprop Dipole true Quadrupole true end
%output Print[P_ReducedOrbPopMO_L] 1 Print[P_ReducedOrbPopMO_M] 1 Print[P_BondOrder_L] 1 Print[P_BondOrder_M] 1 Print[P_Fockian] 1 Print[P_OrbEn] 2 Print[ P_Hirshfeld ] 1 end
%basis
  NewGTO H "def2-TZVPD" end
  NewGTO O "def2-TZVPD" end
end
%pal
 nprocs 4
end
%maxcore 4000
